scripts.build: npm run build -w @trpg/shared-types && echo [build] @trpg/shared-types completed && npm run build -w @trpg/srd-data && npm run sync:fe:srd && npm run build -w @trpg/be && echo [build] @trpg/be completed && npm run build -w @trpg/fe
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @trpg/shared-types && npm run build -w @trpg/srd-data && npm run start:dev -w @trpg/be
scripts.dev:be: npm run build -w @trpg/shared-types && npm run build -w @trpg/srd-data && npm run start:dev -w @trpg/be
scripts.dev:fe: npm run sync:fe:srd && npm run dev -w @trpg/fe
